attacking_style: Opportunistic aggressor who contests intermediate sprints from breakaways and takes calculated risks in technical finales, prioritizing points accumulation over stage wins.
team_tactics: Israel-Premier Tech deploys him in breakaway-focused roles without dedicated lead-out support, allowing tactical flexibility to contest sprints and intermediates when positioned favorably.
terrain_preference: Technical finales and transitional stages where positioning and risk-taking outweigh pure sprint power; thrives in scenarios requiring barrier-side cornering and breakaway positioning.
vulnerability: Lacks pure sprint speed to challenge top-tier finishers in organized bunch sprints; dependent on tactical positioning rather than overwhelming power.
key_patterns: Actively contests intermediate sprints even against faster finishers (2 observations).
Takes barrier-side and technical risks in finales for positioning advantage (2 observations).
Deployed in breakaway specialist role rather than protected sprint scenarios (2 observations).
Prioritizes points accumulation through opportunism over stage victory attempts (2 observations).
form_trajectory: positive: Both 2023 observations show consistent aggressive racing with willingness to take calculated risks for points and positioning.
